title: Clorox: Improving Growth Prospects And A Reasonable Valuation
text: In FY24, Clorox Company's organic sales growth is expected to benefit from volume growth helped by easy comps, new innovations, and increased advertising. Margins are expected to recover to pre-pandemic levels due to carryover impact of pricing, moderating inflation, investments in digital infrastructure, and cost-saving initiatives. The company's stock is trading slightly lower than its historical average, providing a good reason to upgrade the rating to buy, given the prospects of volume and margin recovery in fiscal 2024.
